titleStmt.title: SII 40.274: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 274. (A.R. No. B. 319 of 1933.) Nārṇepāḍu, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a broken Nandi pillar opposite to the temple of Bhīmēśvarasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 11[20], Uttarāyaṇa Saṅkrānti.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Sōmēśvaradēva of Nārāyaṇapāḍu by Nāmi-Nāyaka, the lord of Vallūripura, for the merit of his parents. The gift was entrusted to Mutyabōya, son of Challabrammana, for supply of ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1120 Agunēṁṭi Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti
nimittana vallūri puravarādhīśvaruṁḍaina nāmināyakuṁḍu
damatallidaṁḍrulaku dha¨rmmātthamugā śrīnārāyaṇapāṭi
śrī sōmēśvara mahādēvaraku nakhaṇḍava¨rtti dīpamunakuṁ beṭṭi
na goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni callabrammanabōni koḍku
mutyabōyuṁḍu danaputrānupautrikamācaṁdrā¨rka
mugā nityamāneṇḍu nēyi dīpaṁbunakuṁ bōyaṁgalavāṇḍu
Digital edition of SII 40.274 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
